entry.data:
SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH, BECOMING WEST 10 TO 15 MPH THIS AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE MID 50S IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF RAIN SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLEAR AFTER MIDNIGHT
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 30S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
